examples: This enclosure was so vast that the outermost wall could hardly be seen.
He fired and hit the outermost ring of the target.
The outermost layer of the wall of the heart is also the innermost layer of the visceral pericardium.
The outermost part of this layer prevents other particles, like dirt and grime, from binding to it.
Occupying its outermost third is a convective zone where gas is rising and falling in planet-sized cells.
